headline: These supplements 'actually work': Why this brand stands out
summary: Cymbiotika co-founder and CEO Shahab Elmi joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the company's new Whole Foods partnership and explain how Cymbiotika is standing out in the already-crowded supplement market.

content.title: These supplements 'actually work': Why this brand stands out
content.description: Cymbiotika co-founder and CEO Shahab Elmi joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the company's new Whole Foods partnership and explain how Cymbiotika is standing out in the already-crowded supplement market.

headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Kecia Steelman: Thank you, Kiley, and good afternoon, everyone.  After meeting our ambitious goals in fiscal 2025, we entered fiscal 2026 with a keen focus on continuing our progress while optimizing our model with financial discipline to deliver profitable growth.  Before I dive into the details of our first quarter performance and priorities for the year ahead, I want to share my perspectives on the business.

content.title: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: Kecia Steelman: Thank you, Kiley, and good afternoon, everyone.  After meeting our ambitious goals in fiscal 2025, we entered fiscal 2026 with a keen focus on continuing our progress while optimizing our model with financial discipline to deliver profitable growth.  Before I dive into the details of our first quarter performance and priorities for the year ahead, I want to share my perspectives on the business.

headline: Klarna and Ulta Beauty Partner to Bring Flexible Payments to U.S. Beauty Shoppers
summary: NEW YORK, June 03, 2026--Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, today announced a partnership with Ulta Beauty, the largest specialty beauty retailer in the U.S., to bring flexible payments to millions of U.S. customers shopping on Ulta.com or through the Ulta Beauty app.

content.title: Klarna and Ulta Beauty Partner to Bring Flexible Payments to U.S. Beauty Shoppers
content.summary: NEW YORK, June 03, 2026--Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, today announced a partnership with Ulta Beauty, the largest specialty beauty retailer in the U.S., to bring flexible payments to millions of U.S. customers shopping on Ulta.com or through the Ulta Beauty app.

headline: Ulta Beauty Tops Expectations and Raises Earnings Outlook as Sales Momentum Continues (ULTA)
summary: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) delivered stronger-than-expected first-quarter results, surpassing analyst forecasts on both earnings and revenue while lifting its full-year profit guidance. The upbeat performance helped support investor sentiment, with shares rising around 1% in premarket trading on Wednesday.

content.title: Ulta Beauty Tops Expectations and Raises Earnings Outlook as Sales Momentum Continues (ULTA)
content.summary: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) delivered stronger-than-expected first-quarter results, surpassing analyst forecasts on both earnings and revenue while lifting its full-year profit guidance. The upbeat performance helped support investor sentiment, with shares rising around 1% in premarket trading on Wednesday.

headline: ULTA Q1 Deep Dive: E-Commerce, Exclusive Brands, and Competitive Pressures Shape Outlook
summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.1% year on year to $3.16 billion. Its GAAP profit of $7.74 per share was 12.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: ULTA Q1 Deep Dive: E-Commerce, Exclusive Brands, and Competitive Pressures Shape Outlook
content.summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.1% year on year to $3.16 billion. Its GAAP profit of $7.74 per share was 12.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Does Ulta’s Raised EPS Outlook And Supergirl Tie-In Change The Bull Case For Ulta Beauty (ULTA)?
summary: Ulta Beauty reported past first-quarter 2026 results with sales of US$3,163.86 million and diluted EPS of US$7.74, lifted its full-year EPS outlook slightly, and continued its share repurchase program while maintaining net sales growth guidance. Alongside these financial updates, Ulta Beauty’s exclusive Supergirl film partnership and expanded delivery and international initiatives highlight how the retailer is pairing marketing scale with broader distribution to support its beauty...

headline: Ulta Beauty inks $400M Times Square lease at Jeff Sutton’s 1551 Broadway
summary: Jeff Sutton and Ulta Beauty’s Kecia Steelman with 1551 Broadway (Ulta Beauty, Google Maps, Getty)Beauty retailer Ulta Beauty has inked a massive $400 million lease at Jeff Sutton’s marquee Midtown retail property in Times Square, The Real Deal has learned. The Illinois-based cosmetics and skincare retailer will occupy all four floors of the 26,000-square-foot building at 1551 Broadway, owned by Sutton’s Wharton Properties. The 15-year lease also includes the building’s 250-foot LED sign, a sourc
